description: Knowledge base for Japanese resume creation (2026)

ats_optimization.description: Rules to make rirekisho and shokumukeirekisho readable by Japanese ATS systems
ats_optimization.file_format: PDF preferred, DOCX acceptable if requested
must_have: matching dates between rirekisho and shokumukeirekisho

personal_info.notes: Professional ID-style photo highly recommended for most Japanese companies but not strictly required for generation.

experience.bullets: 3–5 concise bullet points with measurable results
experience.style: Use formal Japanese (です／ます) or である調; no casual phrasing

skills.include: Technical skills, certifications, languages with JLPT/TOEIC levels
skills.notes: Include both Japanese and English keywords for technical terms

cultural_rules.photo: Strongly recommended but optional – formal attire, light background, within last 3 months
cultural_rules.tone: Formal, polite, culturally respectful; avoid emotional or casual tone
cultural_rules.references: Rarely included; mention 'available upon request' if needed

soft_skills: Communication (コミュニケーション能力)

job_market_info.language_requirement: JLPT N2 or above for most roles; N1 for executive/client-facing
